name: Chinese Chicken Salad Dressing I
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Lay Yu hot flavored oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the dark sesame oil, salt, and sugar.
2. Add balsamic vinegar and soy sauce to the mixture.
3. Stir in the chopped green onions and Lay Yu hot flavored oil.
4. Mix well with the fresh garlic.
5. This dressing is highly regarded by Goldstein as a great choice for chicken salad.
